name: PaylinkOps
description: PaylinkOps is a local-first merchant operations console for AI agents and crypto-native teams. It uses MoonPay CLI as the real execution layer for wallet discovery, live deposit creation, deposit retrieval, and transaction inspection, then wraps those actions in receipt-first operator workflows for reconciliation and treasury follow-through. Verified evidence already exists in this repo: MoonPay CLI 1.12.4, authenticated local session, live wallet alias `main`, active deposit id `69c0cc009ec7c7dbcfb5e50c`, and destination wallet explorer links.
problemStatement: MoonPay gives agents real money rails, but operators still need a trustworthy surface around those rails. The painful gap is not whether an agent can create a paylink once; it is whether a team can track a live deposit, inspect transactions, reconcile what was expected vs what arrived, and preserve auditable receipts without falling back to ad hoc scripts and screenshots. PaylinkOps solves that exact MoonPay-shaped operations problem while keeping a demo-safe path for judgeability.
conversationLog: See submission/demo-script.md and public repo history for the concise build narrative.
